title: centaurea iranshahrii
intro: Centaurea iranshahrii is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to Iran. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Centaurea iranshahrii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used to create extracts, oils, and teas, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential applications.
